possible_choices: In contrast to BKT, DKT estimates the student skill as a logit.
In contrast to PFA, it estimates the student's success probability via a logistic function.
In contrast to PFA and BKT, DKT is trained with the help of backpropagation.
In contrast to PFA, it is guarenteed to converge to a global optimum of the loss function.
choice_explanations: No, DKT does not estimate the skill explicitly.
Not quite. PFA does that, as well.
This would have been the correct answer.
No, the loss of DKT is generally not convex and, therefore, no global optimum can be guaranteed. PFA does converge though.
